scripts.install:all: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix packages/shared install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/server install --install-links --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/worker install --install-links --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/shared run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/server run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/worker run typecheck
